assert.//: ADVISORY (warn) until Lighthouse runs against a real Vercel preview (CDN + real images). LHCI on a cold local `next start` with cloudinary=demo + 4x CPU throttle under-scores vs production, so these do NOT block PRs. The BLOCKING per-PR gate is bundle-guard (<=150 KB gz) + image-lint. Targets kept as the numbers to hit. SEO is expectedly low on /checkout (noindex — M05-P09).

bundle.defaultJustification: CLAUDE.md convention #7 — customer routes ≤150 KB gz first-load JS on Fast-3G/360px devices.

/[locale]/(shop)/cart/page.justification: M16-P01 baseline (cart + mini-cart drawer). Target: reduce shared auth/cart chunks to ≤150 KB gz.

/[locale]/(shop)/checkout/page.justification: M16-P01 baseline (multi-step checkout). Target: code-split payment/fulfilment steps to ≤150 KB gz.

/[locale]/(shop)/checkout/pending/[group.justification: M07-P07 pending USSD wait — shares checkout client shell. Target: code-split to ≤150 KB gz.

/[locale]/(shop)/checkout/card/[paymentI.justification: M08-P06 card widget page shares checkout auth shell. Target: ≤150 KB gz after auth chunk split.

/[locale]/(shop)/p/[slug]/page.justification: M16-P01 baseline (PDP gallery + comparison). Target: lazy-load comparison module to ≤150 KB gz.

/[locale]/(auth)/login/page.justification: M16-P01 baseline (auth shell shared with OTP/signup). Target: extract shared auth bundle to ≤150 KB gz.

/[locale]/(auth)/signup/page.justification: M16-P01 baseline (auth shell shared with login/OTP). Target: extract shared auth bundle to ≤150 KB gz.

/[locale]/(auth)/otp/page.justification: M16-P01 baseline (OTP form + auth shell). Target: extract shared auth bundle to ≤150 KB gz.

/[locale]/account/privacy/page.justification: M16-P01 baseline (account shell + privacy content). Target: slim account layout JS to ≤150 KB gz.

/[locale]/(shop)/services/post-job/page.justification: M11-P02 post-job form shares auth + checkout form shell. Target: code-split session client to ≤150 KB gz.

/[locale]/account/jobs/[id]/page.justification: M11-P03 quote-compare page shares the account/session client shell (useSession + quote-action forms). Authenticated route (not public discovery). Target: code-split @vergeo/auth session client to ≤150 KB gz.

lighthouse.justification: Zambia 3G guardrail from docs/plan/00-discovery.md — RTT 150ms, 1.6 Mbps downlink, 4× CPU slowdown.
